calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDER ON JULY-16-2015 IN DEPT. 611 FOR TRIAL DE NOVO WITH THE COURT AND BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, EACH WITH A SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER.

THE COURT REVIEWS THE CASE WITH BOTH PARTIES AND EXPLAINS THE TRIAL DE NOVO PROCEDURES TO ALL PRESENT; THE COURT THEN HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND READS AND REVIEWS A GROUP OF EXHIBITS (PREVIOUSLY USED IN THE ORIGINAL SMALL CLAIMS HEARING) WHILE ON THE BENCH.

AFTER HEARING ADDITIONAL STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND AFTER ADVISING ALL PARTIES PRESENT, THE COURT THEN TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AT 11:57 A.M. AND INFORMS BOTH SIDES THEY WILL BE NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S DECISION BY MAIL. V HON. LESLIE NICHOLS; CLERK(S) K. LEE AND M.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 611).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-16-15 At 09:45 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Continued To Jul-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Judgment Entered
